cells.formula: =IF(OR(n_tournament="The Hundred Men", n_tournament="The Hundred Women"), "1st 10", IF(n_format_a="t20", "1st 12", IF(n_format_a="ODI", "1st 15", IF(n_format_a="t10", "1st 6", "1st 10"))))
=IF(OR(n_tournament="The Hundred Men", n_tournament="The Hundred Women"), "1st 5", IF(n_format_a="t20", "1st 6", IF(n_format_a="t10", "1st 4", "1st 5")))
